_meta.description: Alan Timing Mixing Board — Single source of truth for ALL timing values
_meta.author: Tim (Founder) + Copilot
_meta.warning: Changes here take effect on server restart. Stay within min/max bounds.

voice_pacing._section: How fast Alan speaks and how much he says per turn

tempo_multiplier.description: Audio time-compression. 1.06 = 6% faster playback. Compounds with TTS speed.

tts_default_speed.description: Default TTS speed when no prosody intent overrides. 1.12 = 12% faster than baseline.

max_sentences.description: Maximum sentences per turn. Was 5 (over-response in Batch 1), now 3. Prompt says 2-3 ideal.

question_cap_per_turn.description: Max questions per turn. Prevents double-question pattern. 1 = one question max.

prosody_speed_map._section: Per-intent TTS speed overrides. Each intent gets its own speaking pace.

turn_timing._section: How long Alan waits for the caller and how fast he responds

turn_timeout.description: How long to wait after caller stops speaking before Alan responds. Was 6.3→3.0→2.5. Tighter for faster perceived response.

llm_parameters._section: LLM generation parameters — controls response length and creativity

relay_max_tokens.description: Max tokens for relay LLM calls. Was 80→60→45→100 (P0 Fix: 45 caused mid-sentence truncation on early turns, breaking rapport and identity). 100 = ~3 sentences, enough for any business answer without truncation.

direct_max_tokens.description: Max tokens for Alan direct LLM calls (fuller responses).

temperature.description: LLM temperature for relay calls. Lower = more focused, higher = more creative.

frequency_penalty.description: LLM frequency penalty. Reduces repetitive phrasing.

call_pacing._section: Call-level timing — ring duration, cooldowns, machine detection

ring_timeout.description: How long to let the phone ring before giving up. 35 = ~7-8 rings. Was 50 (too long, hits voicemail).

campaign_cooldown.description: Campaign cooldown between calls (tools/cooldown_manager). 300 = 5 minutes. [2026-03-02] Was 150 (2.5 min) — doubled to preserve precious leads.

health_check_interval.description: How often the System Health Guardian runs basic checks.

deep_check_interval.description: How often the Guardian runs deep diagnostics (credential liveness, DB integrity).

breath_patterns._section: Human breath injection timing for natural speech cadence

prosody_silence_frames._section: Inter-sentence silence frames per prosody intent. 1 frame ≈ 20ms. Research-backed: Stivers et al. 2009 (mean gap +208ms), Kendrick 2015 (trouble threshold 700ms), Gong.io (2M sales calls — top reps pause longer after objections).

silence_thresholds._section: Conversation-science silence boundaries. Kendrick 2015: within-speaker gap 520ms, trouble threshold 700ms, standard max 1s. These mark the psychological edges — past trouble_threshold, callers sense something is wrong.

trouble_threshold_ms.description: Silence beyond this feels abnormal to callers (Kendrick 2015). Alan should never exceed this between sentences.

standard_max_silence_ms.description: Absolute max silence before callers disengage. Stivers 2009: 1s = standard maximum gap in English conversation.

conversation_science._section: Research references — NOT used in code, purely for human documentation of why values are what they are.

sources.name: Stivers et al. 2009 (PNAS)
sources.key_findings: Mean gap +208ms, English median 0ms, universals of turn-taking

sources.name: Kendrick 2015 (Frontiers in Psychology)
sources.key_findings: Within-speaker pause 520ms, trouble threshold 700ms, standard max 1s

sources.name: Gong.io Sales Call Analysis
sources.dataset: 2,000,000+ real sales calls analyzed by AI/ML
sources.key_findings: Talk ratio 55:45 on successful cold calls, top reps pause longer after objections, 77% more speaker switches on successful calls, prospect monologue 3.5s successful vs 8s unsuccessful

design_principles: neutral bumped 120ms → 200ms to match Stivers mean gap (+208ms)
objection_handling bumped 180ms → 300ms — Gong: top reps pause ages longer after objections
No silence value should exceed trouble_threshold (700ms) between sentences
empathetic_reflect at 280ms — near Stivers mean, gives emotional breath space
